FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: af217b1e-7040-4d59-8269-55c55a54e82b
  PREDICTED_SMILES: CC(C)C(NC(=O)OC(C)(C)C)C(=O)NC(C)C(=O)OC(C)(C)C
  CONFIDENCE: 0.95
  REASON_BRIEF: The formula C17H32N2O5, HRMS, and NMR data are consistent with a Boc‑protected Val‑Ala dipeptide tert‑butyl ester. Two t‑Bu groups (¹H singlets at 1.41 and 1.39 ppm), three methyl doublets (Val and Ala side chains), two NH protons (including a Boc‑NH), and carbonyl signals for a carbamate, amide, and ester confirm the structure.
